_doc: GENERATED by scripts/bake-ortho.mjs — provenance for the base-map drape texture (assets/ortho-walferdange.jpg). bbox matches index.html GEO_BBOX so per-vertex UV = lon/lat fraction. Present-day imagery for spatial context, distinct from the reconstructed Roman archaeology.

ortho.provider: ACT (Administration du cadastre et de la topographie), Luxembourg
ortho.note: Draped on the LiDAR terrain for spatial context; matches the 2019 ACT LiDAR epoch.
